title: Whisked Canadian Almond Casserole
description: A rich and fluffy brunch dish featuring almonds, ideal for those following a high-protein diet.

ingredients.name: Strawberries
ingredients.amount: 8 oz fresh or 4 oz frozen and thawed, sliced

ingredients.name: Hummus
ingredients.notes: Use light hummus for a lower calorie option

instructions: In a large bowl, mix together almond butter, Greek yogurt, vanilla extract, and olive oil.
Add sliced strawberries, chopped pistachios, and granulated sugar. Stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to an oven-safe dish and bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown on top.
Serve warm as a dessert or snack with a side of honey if desired.
